summary: Verified the correction of teaser/screenshots split. Cinematic teaser now uses original book->mindmap frames (frame1_studio.jpg, frame2_library.jpg, frame3_cloud.jpg). New 'See it in action' screenshots gallery section (#screenshots / data-testid=landing-screenshots) was added between #features and #how, displaying the three product screenshots (mind-mapper-1/2/3.png). All 6 image URLs respond 200. Section ordering correct. Teaser auto-advance still cycles every ~5s. Studio at /app?unlock=mind-mapper67 mounts and mm-tb-connect-mode toolbar button is present. Frontend-only test as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is now ~590 lines and continues to grow. Consider extracting Hero, BuiltFor, Features, Screenshots, How, CTA, Footer subcomponents to keep file <500 lines.
ScreenshotsSection items have no native lazy-loading fallback for browsers without IntersectionObserver — currently OK because is used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter_56 confirmed CinematicTeaser frames reverted to /teaser/frame{1,2,3}_*.jpg, and new #screenshots section with /teaser/mind-mapper-{1,2,3}.png lives between #features and #how. All assets 200. Teaser cycling and studio /app mount with mm-tb-connect-mode all working.
